channel.title: Daily AI Digest
channel.description: Curated AI/ML signals — zero LLMs, pure algorithmic curation

item.title: Echo-Memory: A Controlled Study of Memory in Action World Models
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.GR — We present \textbf{Echo-Memory}, a controlled study of memory mechanisms in action-conditioned world models. These models generate multi-segment videos from a first frame, text prompt, and camera-action sequence, but their central failure is often memory rather than local image synthesis: after t...

item.title: Latent Spatial Memory for Video World Models
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — Video world models that maintain 3D spatial consistency across generated frames typically rely on explicit point cloud memory constructed in RGB space. This design is both computationally expensive, requiring repeated rendering and VAE encoding, and inherently lossy, as the round trip through pix...

item.title: OmniGameArena: A Unified UE5 Benchmark for VLM Game Agents with Improvement Dynamics
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.AI — Vision-language model (VLM) agents are increasingly deployed in interactive game environments. Yet game benchmarks for VLM agents typically report a single first-attempt score per (agent, game) pair, focus on single-agent Solo play, and lack unified protocols for evaluating heterogeneous agent cl...

item.title: End-to-End Context Compression at Scale
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CL, cs.AI — Long-context language model inference is bottlenecked by memory, as the KV cache grows with context length. Recent techniques to compress the KV cache fall short: they either degrade model quality substantially or require considerable time and compute to compress a single long prompt. Furthermore...

item.title: AHA-WAM:Asynchronous Horizon-Adaptive World-Action Modeling with Observation-Guided Context Routing
item.description: 📄 New in cs.RO, cs.AI — World-action models have emerged as a promising paradigm for robot manipulation, jointly modeling visual scene dynamics and actions to inject physical priors into policy learning. However, existing world-action models couple world prediction and action execution at the same temporal resolution, f...

item.title: Evaluation Cards: An Interpretive Layer for AI Evaluation Reporting
item.description: 📄 New in cs.AI — AI evaluation results are produced at scale but reported inconsistently across leaderboards, model cards, benchmark papers, and company blogs. The cost is interpretive: readers cannot reliably compare results across sources, identify what a report omits, or trace an aggregate claim to its underly...

item.title: SpatialWorld: Benchmarking Interactive Spatial Reasoning of Multimodal Agents in Real-World Tasks
item.description: 📄 New in cs.AI, cs.CL — Spatial reasoning is a foundational capability for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to perceive and operate within the physical world. However, existing benchmarks predominantly rely on passive evaluation (e.g., static VQA) or simulator-specific pipelines, failing to assess general intera...

item.title: Andyyyy64 / whichllm
item.description: 💬 Active HN discussion (68 comments) · ⭐ 143 GitHub stars today — Find the local LLM that actually runs and performs best on your hardware. Ranked by real, recency-aware benchmarks, not parameter count. One command, run it instantly.

item.title: mvanhorn / last30days-skill
item.description: ⭐ 3.6k GitHub stars today · ⭐ 35.9k total stars — AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

item.description: ⭐ 546 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 84.7k total stars — TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

item.title: Retro Revamped: How to Design a Graphic Y2K-Style Poster Using AI
item.description: 🆕 New article — <div class="medium-feed-item"><p class="medium-feed-image"><a href="https://medium.com/@hi_87782/retro-revamped-how-to-design-a-graphic-y2k-style-poster-using-ai-793424590485?source=rss------ai-5"><img src="https://cdn-images-1.medium.com/max/1024/0*GE6HJm03VCnJ-U5n.png" width="1024" /></a></p><p...

item.title: luongnv89 / claude-howto
item.description: ⭐ 312 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 36.1k total stars — A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.
